abstract: Complete guide for managing Tigris Storage buckets, designed for AI agents and LLMs. Covers the full bucket lifecycle including createBucket, listBuckets, getBucketInfo, and removeBucket operations. Details access control configuration (public/private), region selection, snapshot enablement, pagination patterns, and the force delete option for non-empty buckets. Each operation includes TypeScript examples, parameter descriptions, error handling patterns, and best practices for bucket naming and organization.
